description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-icon` (T3-63). 6/6 libraries ship an icon component.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, icon name/set typing, size prop, color prop, all available icons typed (union or string with autocomplete)
2. Accessibility — decorative icons: `aria-hidden="true"` (default), meaningful icons: require `aria-label` prop or label from parent context, never convey meaning by icon alone without text, axe-core pass
3. Tests — decorative (aria-hidden), labeled, all sizes, color variants, unknown icon fallback
4. Storybook — icon catalog (all available), size/color demos, decorative vs labeled demo
5. CSS — size via `--hx-*` tokens, color inherits from `currentColor` (uses parent text color), CSS parts
6. Performance — SVG sprite vs inline strategy (no icon should add 5KB by itself), bundle < 3KB for the component
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side icon selection

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-icon — T3-63 antagonistic quality review
